---
title: "Package Notebooks"
---

This page contains links to the individual notebooks per package. In the notebook, each package is run against all the datasets with results and plots stored.

<div class = "row text-center">
<div class = "col-md-6">
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2019/NNbenchmark-nb-amore.html" target = "_blank">       AMORE</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2019/NNbenchmark-nb-ann2.html" target = "_blank">        ANN2</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2019/NNbenchmark-nb-automl.html" target = "_blank">      automl</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2019/NNbenchmark-nb-brnn.html" target = "_blank">        brnn</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2019/NNbenchmark-nb-cadence.html" target = "_blank">     CaDENCE</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2019/NNbenchmark-nb-deepnet.html" target = "_blank">     deepnet</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2019/NNbenchmark-nb-elmnnrcpp.html" target = "_blank">   elmNNRcpp</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2019/NNbenchmark-nb-elmr.html" target = "_blank">        ELMR</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2019/NNbenchmark-nb-h2o.html" target = "_blank">         h2o</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2019/NNbenchmark-nb-keras.html" target = "_blank">       keras</a> <br>
</div>


<div class = "col-md-6">
</div>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2019/NNbenchmark-nb-machineshop.html" target = "_blank">   MachineShop</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2019/NNbenchmark-nb-minpacklm.html" target = "_blank">     minpack.lm</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2019/NNbenchmark-nb-monmlp.html" target = "_blank">        monmlp</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2019/NNbenchmark-nb-neuralnet.html" target = "_blank">     neuralnet</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2019/NNbenchmark-nb-nlsr.html" target = "_blank">          nlsr</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2019/NNbenchmark-nb-nnet.html" target = "_blank">          nnet</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2019/NNbenchmark-nb-qrnn.html" target = "_blank">          qrnn</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2019/NNbenchmark-nb-radiantmodel.html" target = "_blank">  radiant.model</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2019/NNbenchmark-nb-rminer.html" target = "_blank">        rminer</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2019/NNbenchmark-nb-rsnns.html" target = "_blank">         RSNNS</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2019/NNbenchmark-nb-snnr.html" target = "_blank">          snnR</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2019/NNbenchmark-nb-tsensembler.html" target = "_blank">   tsensembler</a> <br>
</div>
